message:
chore(gitignore): cover test_dir scratch binary + .beads/*.lock

* test_dir: a 4.2MB scratch executable that `cargo --example`-style
  experiments leave at the repo root. Already have test_bug and
  test_dotenv explicitly listed in the "Ephemeral test/runtime
  artifacts" block; add test_dir alongside them.

* .beads/*.lock: with the mcp_agent_mail write path and the beads_rust
  MCP server both acquiring `.beads/.write.lock` and `.beads/.sync.lock`
  on mutating operations (see beads_rust 3a40ad0), these lock files
  show up in the working tree any time either runs. Add a single
  glob rather than enumerating every lock name individually.

files.patch:
@@ -92,6 +92,9 @@ SilverFox:
 # Beads history snapshots
 .beads/.br_history/
 
+# Beads lock files (write/sync/bv/br advisory flocks)
+.beads/*.lock
+
 # Claude Code / AI agent ephemeral files
 .claude/
 
@@ -287,6 +290,7 @@ release-artifacts/
 # Ephemeral test/runtime artifacts
 storage.sqlite3.activity.lock
 test_bug
+test_dir
 test_dotenv
 
 # Release preparation build artifacts
